method: For each task in the registry except the excluded experimental what-if/late-added tasks, the runner executes POST /api/analytics/run and forwards the returned executionId, datasets, and meta to POST /api/ai/explain. The output records the actual AI explanation content, degraded fallbacks, latency, token usage, cost, confidence, safety flags, and schema conformance.

context.task_source: Backend task registry, includeExperimental=true, minus excluded task ids

insights.description: With 192 students identified as high risk, targeted interventions are essential to prevent further academic decline.

evidence.context: Total students in the class

educational_implications: A large portion of the class may struggle with academic success due to low engagement and high-risk status.

recommendations.action: Implement targeted outreach programs for high-risk students.
recommendations.rationale: Direct support can help address individual challenges and improve engagement.

recommendations.action: Increase monitoring of student engagement metrics weekly.
recommendations.rationale: Regular tracking will provide timely insights into student progress and allow for swift interventions.

recommendations.action: Facilitate workshops on effective study habits and resource utilization.
recommendations.rationale: Empowering students with skills can enhance their engagement and performance.

confidence.reason: Data is comprehensive and reflects the current status of student engagement and risk.
